arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَلاَّدٍ أَبُو عُمَرَ، قَالَ ‏:‏ كَانَ عِنْدَنَا مَكُّوكٌ يُقَالُ لَهُ مَكُّوكُ خَالِدٍ وَكَانَ كَيْلَجَتَيْنِ بِكَيْلَجَةِ هَارُونَ، قَالَ مُحَمَّدٌ ‏:‏ صَاعُ خَالِدٍ صَاعُ هِشَامٍ يَعْنِي ابْنَ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ ‏.‏

english.narrator: Narrated Muhammad b. Muhmmad b. Khattab Abu 'Umar :
english.text: We had a makkuk which was called Makkuk Khalid. Its capacity was two measurements according to the measurements of Harun. The narrator said: The sa' of Khalid was the sa' of Hisham b. 'Abd al-Malik.

arabic.title: سنن أبي داود
arabic.author: الإمام سليمان بن الأشعث أبو داود السجستاني

english.title: Sunan Abi Dawud
english.author: Imam Sulayman ibn al-Ash'ath Abu Dawud al-Sijistani

chapter.english: Oaths and Vows (Kitab Al-Aiman Wa Al-Nudhur)
